fca_consumer_duty_2026.name: FCA Consumer Duty — annual board-report ramp
fca_consumer_duty_2026.seat: Head of Regulatory / Customer Communications (Consumer Duty board report + remediation comms)
fca_consumer_duty_2026.angle: FS firms must lay an annual Consumer Duty board report by 31 Jul; the Q2 run-up is a repeatable retained-search window for the permanent regulatory-comms seat — pitch before they advertise.
fca_consumer_duty_2026.scope_note: FCA-regulated retail financial-services firms (banks, insurers, asset & wealth managers).
fca_consumer_duty_2026.source: FCA Consumer Duty (PRIN 2A) — annual board report, recurring 31 July cadence.

uk_srs_2026.name: UK SRS — first sustainability-reporting build-up
uk_srs_2026.seat: Head of Sustainability / ESG & Corporate-Reporting Communications
uk_srs_2026.angle: UK SRS (IFRS S1/S2) endorsement + FCA listed-issuer consultation land in 2026; large issuers build sustainability-reporting comms ahead of the first mandatory cycle — get the retained brief before the rush hire.
uk_srs_2026.scope_note: FTSE-weight UK-listed issuers in the high-exposure sectors (financials, energy/utilities, pharma, industrials).
uk_srs_2026.source: DBT/FRC UK SRS endorsement programme + FCA consultation on listed-company sustainability disclosure, 2026.

mog_post_sr_2026.name: Machinery-of-government — post-Spending-Review reshuffle
mog_post_sr_2026.seat: Director of Communications (GCS) — transition & change communications
mog_post_sr_2026.angle: Spending Review 2025 settlements drive 2026/27 departmental restructures; GCS comms-leadership and transition-comms briefs open as departments and ALBs reorganise — be ahead of the GCS recruitment cycle.
mog_post_sr_2026.scope_note: UK central-government departments and major ALBs (plus large charities exposed to the same funding cycle).
mog_post_sr_2026.source: HM Treasury Spending Review 2025 settlements → departmental delivery-plan / reorganisation cycle, FY2026/27.

agm_reporting_2026.name: UK annual-report & AGM season
agm_reporting_2026.seat: Head of Investor Relations / Corporate-Reporting & Governance Communications
agm_reporting_2026.angle: Dec-year-end issuers publish annual reports Feb–Apr and run AGMs Apr–Jun; the run-up is a repeatable retained-search window for the permanent IR/corporate-reporting comms seat — pitch before the crunch.
agm_reporting_2026.scope_note: FTSE-weight Dec-year-end UK-listed issuers (financials, energy/utilities, industrials, pharma).
agm_reporting_2026.source: Companies Act annual-report + Listing Rules AGM cycle (December year-ends), 2026.

gender_pay_gap_2026.name: Gender Pay Gap — reporting & scrutiny window
gender_pay_gap_2026.seat: Head of Internal / DEI Communications (gender-pay narrative + scrutiny response)
gender_pay_gap_2026.angle: Statutory GPG reports land Mar–Apr; the publication & media-scrutiny window is a repeatable retained-search window for the permanent internal/DEI-comms seat.
gender_pay_gap_2026.scope_note: UK employers with 250+ staff (statutory GPG reporters).
gender_pay_gap_2026.source: Equality Act 2010 (Gender Pay Gap Information) Regulations 2017 — annual 4 Apr / 30 Mar deadlines.

nhs_planning_2026.name: NHS operational-planning & restructure round
nhs_planning_2026.legal_date: NHS England 2026/27 operational planning + Apr FY
nhs_planning_2026.seat: Director of Communications — NHS transition & change communications
nhs_planning_2026.angle: NHS planning guidance + ICB/trust restructures cluster Q1 into the new financial year; comms-leadership and change-comms briefs open before the recruitment cycle.
nhs_planning_2026.scope_note: NHS trusts, ICBs and arm's-length bodies.
nhs_planning_2026.source: NHS England operational planning guidance + FY2026/27 cycle.

he_clearing_2026.name: Higher-Education clearing & new-intake comms
he_clearing_2026.legal_date: UCAS Clearing Jul–Aug; academic year starts Sep 2026
he_clearing_2026.seat: Head of Communications / Student Recruitment & Marketing Communications
he_clearing_2026.angle: Clearing + new-intake drive a predictable HE comms & marketing capacity surge; secure the retained brief before the summer scramble.
